title: Finding a lost dog
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: On my way home from school yesterday, I saw a small dog running alone near the park. It looked frightened, and there was no owner anywhere (27). I did not know what to do at first, but I decided to follow it carefully. After a few minutes, the dog stopped beside a bench and allowed me to come closer. It had a phone number written (28) its collar, so I called the owner immediately. The woman who answered sounded very worried and said the dog had escaped (29) her garden earlier that afternoon. While I waited for her to arrive, I sat with the dog and gave it some water. The owner arrived faster (30) I expected and thanked me several times. She said the dog was old and could not walk very far (31) help. I was glad that I had been able to help (32) such a simple way.

questions.explanation: Nearby means close to that place.
Without help means alone or unaided.
Fixed phrase: in such a way.
